No Poverty.reason: Course protects vulnerable consumers with less financial resources and information from disputes, ensuring their economic rights and access to fair financial services, aligning with Target 1.4.
evidence: 一般大眾因為財力、資訊與專業，均不如專業的金融機構

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course description relates to hunger, food security, or agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course description relates to health, well-being, or medical services.

Quality Education.reason: Course explicitly enhances students' financial legal professional knowledge and aids future employment, directly supporting Target 4.4 on relevant skills for decent jobs.
evidence: 增強同學們的金融法律相關專業知識
對於對同學們未來就業有所幫助

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Course explicitly states it helps students with future employment, directly supporting Target 8.5 on achieving full and productive employment and decent work.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No evidence in the course description relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Course directly addresses inequalities in financial resources, information, and expertise between the public and institutions, protecting rights and promoting equal opportunity (Target 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course description relates to sustainable cities, communities, or urban development.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course description relates to responsible consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course description relates to climate action or environmental protection.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Course is fundamentally about legal frameworks (Financial Consumer Protection Act) and an institution (Ombudsman) providing access to justice and effective dispute resolution (Targets 16.3, 16.6).
evidence: 提供快速、專業的金融糾紛解決途徑

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Course explicitly states cooperation with the Financial Ombudsman Institution, demonstrating a multi-stakeholder partnership (university and public-interest foundation) as per Target 17.17.
evidence: 本課程與金融消費評議中心合作
